title: Add Tasks
description: Add Instagram reel URLs or profile URLs to scrape reels using the Lobstr.io API

content.introduction: Add Instagram URLs as tasks to your squid. You can provide either a direct reel URL to scrape a specific reel, or a profile URL to collect all reels from that profile.

urlFormats.title: Supported URL Formats
urlFormats.content:
**Direct Reel URL:**

`https://www.instagram.com/reel/ABC123xyz/`

**Profile URL (collects all reels from profile):**

`https://www.instagram.com/username/`

**Post URL:**

`https://www.instagram.com/p/ABC123xyz/`

rows.description: Instagram Reel URL or Profile URL. If a profile URL is given, the scraper will collect reels from that profile.

proTips.content: Use profile URLs to bulk collect all reels from a creator's account in one task.
When scraping a profile, use `max_results` setting to limit how many reels are collected per profile.
Both `instagram.com` and `www.instagram.com` URL formats are supported.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Instagram Reels Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Instagram reel URLs or profile URLs as tasks to scrape reels data using the lobstr.io API.
